project_type: Next.js 16 with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v3.4, Framer Motion v11.3
test_command: npm run build (no tests, build verification only)
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to verify no TypeScript or build errors
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. Node.js available.
contribution_requirements: Keep existing branding (navy #091E33 to #1B3A5C + gold #C68A2E to #E8C66A), use existing Tailwind config colors, use Playfair Display for headings and Inter for body text, use lucide-react for icons, use framer-motion for animations, keep existing CSS utility classes from globals.css
key_patterns: Components in src/components/sections/ for homepage sections. Use 'use client' directive for components with hooks/animations. Card styling uses card-premium, shadow-premium, shadow-premium-lg CSS classes. Buttons use btn-premium and shimmer-btn classes. Gold text uses gold-text class. Section headers use inline badge + h2 + gold-divider pattern. All images use Next.js Image component. Products page uses framer-motion variants for staggered animations.
directory_structure: src/app/ - pages (page.tsx files). src/components/sections/ - homepage section components. src/components/ - shared components (Navbar, Footer, etc). public/products/ - local product images (17 jpg files). public/ - logo.png, logo-mark.png.
